mapper.select: SELECT * FROM remind_task WHERE status = 1 AND remind_date <= CURDATE() AND ( remind_date = CURDATE() OR repeat_cycle = 1 OR (repeat_cycle = 2 AND DAYOFWEEK(remind_date) = DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE())) OR (repeat_cycle = 3 AND DAYOFMONTH(remind_date) = DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE())) ) AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURDATE())

SELECT * FROM remind_task WHERE status = 1 AND user_id = #{userId} AND remind_date <= CURDATE() AND ( remind_date = CURDATE() OR repeat_cycle = 1 OR (repeat_cycle = 2 AND DAYOFWEEK(remind_date) = DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE())) OR (repeat_cycle = 3 AND DAYOFMONTH(remind_date) = DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE())) ) AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURDATE())

SELECT * FROM remind_task WHERE status = 1 AND elder_id = #{elderId} AND remind_date <= CURDATE() AND ( remind_date = CURDATE() OR repeat_cycle = 1 OR (repeat_cycle = 2 AND DAYOFWEEK(remind_date) = DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE())) OR (repeat_cycle = 3 AND DAYOFMONTH(remind_date) = DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE())) ) AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURDATE())
